examples: Women sometimes damage their skin by going overboard with abrasive cleansers.
In the late Middle Ages, it was customary to scrape away the surface of the parchment with an abrasive, which completely wiped out any writing that was there.
His abrasive manner has won him an unenviable notoriety.
His abrasive style could have been a factor in the decision to make a change.
Kutaragi may seem abrasive to some (see "The Chairman and the Rebel"), but he has power.
